CreateJob.resourcePoolId: Unique resource pool identifier; use pool ID (e.g., cce-1uji3ib5) for self-managed pools, or aihc-serverless for managed pools
CreateJob.queueID: Queue the training job belongs to; provide queue name for self-managed pools, queue ID for managed pools
CreateJob.name: Name
CreateJob.queue: Queue the training job belongs to; keep consistent with queueID
CreateJob.jobType: Distributed framework type; supports PyTorchJob, TFJob, MPIJob, RayJob. Default: PyTorchJob
CreateJob.jobSpec: Training job configuration, format determined by jobType: ① PyTorchJob: pass a single JobSpec object; ② TFJob: pass a Map (keys: Chief/Worker/PS/Evaluator, values: corresponding role JobSpec); ③ RayJob: pass a Map (must include Head key, values: corresponding role JobSpec)
CreateJob.labels: Training job labels; included by default: 1. aijob.cce.baidubce.com/create-from-aihcp-api: "true"  2. aijob.cce.baidubce.com/ai-user-id: {accoutId}  3. aijob.cce.baidubce.com/ai-user-name: {userName}
CreateJob.priority: Scheduling priority; supports high, normal, low. Default: normal
CreateJob.datasources: Data source configuration; currently supports pfs, hostpath, bos, cfs, rapidfs, dataset
CreateJob.datasources.name: Yes
CreateJob.enableBccl: Whether to enable BCCL auto-injection; disabled by default. Requirements: 1. At least 2 instances; 2. Each instance occupies a full 8-GPU node; 3. RDMA enabled; 4. GPU model is A800/HPAS
CreateJob.faultTolerance: Whether to enable fault tolerance; disabled by default. Currently supported for PyTorchJob
CreateJob.tensorboardConfig: TensorBoard configuration; RayJob does not support TensorBoard
CreateJob.alertConfig: Alert configuration; PyTorchJob supports all alerts, TFJob supports job-status alerts, MPIJob does not support alerts, RayJob supports job-status alerts
CreateJob.retentionPeriod: Retention period after job completion; format: 1m (1 minute), 1h (1 hour), 1d (1 day). RayJob does not support retention period
CreateJob.advancedSettings: Advanced RayJob configuration (optional); controls runtime environment and submitter retry policy
